expected_environment: Peak cottonwood fall color in the canyon — brilliant gold against red canyon walls. Expect 60–80°F days and 35–45°F nights. The park shuttle is required into Zion Canyon; no private vehicles. Noticeably fewer crowds than summer. Water in The Narrows will be cool (~55°F) — wetsuit rentals available in Springdale.

getting_here.from_previous: Drive north on I-15 from Las Vegas (2.5 hours) or south from Salt Lake City (4.5 hours). Enter via the south entrance at Springdale.

en_route_stops.name: Kolob Canyons Viewpoint
en_route_stops.description: Five soaring red finger canyons visible from a short 0.2-mile paved walk. Often overlooked by canyon-bound visitors.

top_attractions.name: Angels Landing
top_attractions.description: Iconic summit hike with chain-assist final push and 360° canyon panoramas.
top_attractions.practical_note: Permit required via NPS lottery ($6/person). Book 3 months ahead.

top_attractions.name: The Narrows
top_attractions.description: Wade through the Virgin River between 2,000-foot slot canyon walls. Water ~55°F in October.
top_attractions.practical_note: Rent neoprene socks and dry pants from Zion Adventure Company in Springdale.

possible_daily_schedule: 7:00 AM — Board shuttle at Springdale Visitor Center (arrives before crowds)
1:00–2:00 PM — Lunch at Zion Lodge cafeteria or Castle Dome Cafe
3:00–5:30 PM — Canyon Overlook Trail (no shuttle needed, dramatic views)

dinner_recommendations.name: Spotted Dog Cafe
dinner_recommendations.description: Beloved local institution inside Flanigan's Inn. Wild game specials, local craft beer.

dinner_recommendations.name: Zion Pizza & Noodle Co
dinner_recommendations.description: Casual, cash-friendly spot in a converted church. Best value in Springdale.

dinner_recommendations.name: King's Landing Bistro
dinner_recommendations.description: Upscale patio dining with canyon views. Excellent steaks and seasonal specials.

dinner_recommendations.name: Deep Creek Coffee Co
dinner_recommendations.description: Breakfast and light lunch. Best espresso in Springdale, outdoor seating.

dinner_recommendations.name: MeMe's Cafe
dinner_recommendations.description: Community staple. Enormous portions, friendly staff, patio view of canyon walls.
